examples: To add verisimilitude, the stage is covered with sand for the desert scenes.
At the required level of visual verisimilitude, computer animation is extremely costly.
In terms of verisimilitude, then, Ken had little to complain about.
Attempting to lend verisimilitude to his analysis, Benbrook states repeatedly that his analysis is based on official, government (USDA) pesticide usage data.
He demonstrated this verisimilitude much the way that we watch kitty videos on YouTube today: by showing visual exclamations of everyday things.
